title: BoxFaller
body:
# BoxFaller - Automatic Loot Box Spawning Plugin
![description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2590fbad2352c6463d0bb0984624d1bb0535d66.png)
BoxFaller is a Paper Minecraft plugin that automatically spawns loot boxes around players. These boxes contain random items, from common to rare, and come with visual and sound effects to enhance the experience.


## Main Features​
- ✅ Automatic Loot Box Spawning Boxes appear at set intervals, with adjustable spawn radius.

- ✅ Configurable Spawn Timer Set spawn intervals in config.yml (minimum: 1 minute, default: 10 minutes).

- ✅ Spawn Effects Thunder sound on spawn. Particles (fire, portal, magic aura) around the box. Sky flash to indicate drop location.

- ✅ Different Box Types Configurable spawn rates in config.yml: Rare – (default 5%) contains powerful items. Common – (default 30%) includes useful items. ⚫ Empty – (default 65%) contains nothing valuable.

- ✅ Random Loot System Common boxes – iron, gold, food, arrows, and other essentials. Rare boxes – diamond swords, enchanted gear, unique items. Empty boxes – may contain junk (rotten flesh, sticks) or be empty.

- ✅ Safe Spawn System Boxes avoid water, lava, and leaves. Do not spawn in unloaded chunks to prevent server issues. Spawn radius limited to 100 blocks from players.
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f71505c96a0a7f430396c4d6b9689530e0ed47d.png)

## Commands & Permissions ​
Available Commands
/boxfall start – starts loot box spawning process
/boxfall stop – stops loot box spawning
/boxfall reload – reloads configuration from config.yml
/boxfall spawn – spawns loot boxes manually
#                                      TEST ALL OUR PLUGINS HERE
#                                SERVER: javarangers.falixsrv.me:22707 >
#                             (PLEASE NOTE, server version 1.21.4)
Permissions boxfaller.admin – full control over the plugin.

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa6c43fc7fe8bf257c0c684f5f94e084177d6c52.png)

## Free Version Limitations (More Features in PRO Version)
- ❌No custom NBT item creation.
- ❌No spawn zone settings (biomes, worlds, coordinates).
- ❌No detailed drop rate configuration.
- ❌No GUI menu (config.yml only).
- ❌No advanced effects like fireworks and chest animations.
- ❌No cross-server sync (BungeeCord support).

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cefc4f3d8f5b67b0dade2278b5b2f1c6ed5d91a.png)

## Installation
Download BoxFaller.jar and place it in the plugins folder. Start the server – config.yml will be auto-generated. Adjust config.yml settings. Use /boxfall reload to apply changes. Use /boxfall start after then.

Done! Boxes will start spawning automatically.
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6483a477233dd2af1776afc294dff6624256e15c.png)

## PRO Version Features
- ✅Custom NBT item settings – add unique items.
- ✅Spawn zone configuration – biomes, worlds, coordinates.
- ✅Advanced drop customization – detailed item chances.
- ✅GUI menu – user-friendly setup.
- ✅Extra effects – fireworks, chest animations.
- ✅Cross-server sync – BungeeCord support.
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d7c8754fbea85033d139f82617dcff802246545.png)

## [DONATION](https://www.donationalerts.com/r/javarangersbe)

Disclaimer: These images are illustrative and do not represent actual in-game graphics. The final appearance may vary based on Minecraft's visual style and server settings.
